description.value: Up to 12 creatures you can see at medium range make Will saves. Compare your weaving successes to each target's save successes. Those you beat follow your suggested course of activity (1-2 sentences) that sounds reasonable. Targets pursue activity for 4 hours or until completing it. Obviously harmful suggestions end weave for that target. Creatures immune to charm are immune.

system.targetingSuccessScaling:
- 0 = no effect
- 1 = 1 hour
- 2 = full effect (4 hours)
- 3 = 12 hours
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
